docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, CHRISTY AS TO DEFENDANT WIEGAND, GARRY PAUL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-28-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-26-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-10-1998
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-04-1998 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-04-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON AUG-04-1998, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-19-1998 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-28-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT; TO PAY SANCTIONS IMPOSED OSC TO PLTF'S IN PRO PER HEARING SET FOR OCT-07-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-07-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-07-1998, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-22-1998 CONTINUED FROM OCT-07-1998 TO DEC-02-1998 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
